data.body: OPTION A LANDED + OPTION E FILED. Option A (soulless-kinglike-polliwog): made docs/api-stability.md version-agnostic (removed 'currently 0.8.0' package marker, link CHANGELOG/Releases; adopts FastAPI/attrs pattern), DELETED tests/unit/test_version_sync.py (drift-guard for the removed marker), fixed docs/releasing.md step-1 dangling refs (preserved 1.0-decl ref). Bonus: de-literaled the same stale 'SCHEMA_VERSION (currently 3)'->5 anti-pattern in api-stability.md AND docs/event-schema.md. Plan-review round 2 PASS+signed (round 1 BLOCK: my AC over-broadly banned 'api-stability' which would false-fail the legit 1.0-decl ref). Change 732 merged (both votes), closed+signed. Option E (deficient-eastmost-hoopoe): idea filed for VCS-derived versioning (hatch-vcs/setuptools-scm) with the open design questions (server.json sync, dispatch-vs-tag ordering, fetch-tags, REBAR_BUILD_COMMIT interaction), related_to Option A.
